user.title: Hikvision Doorbell Setup
user.description: Configure your Hikvision Doorbell integration. The doorbell server is provided by the Hikvision Doorbell add-on.

data_description.server_url: URL of the Hikvision Doorbell server, e.g. http://localhost:8080
data_description.frigate_url: URL of your Frigate instance, e.g. https://frigate.example.com
data_description.camera_name: Name of the doorbell camera in Frigate, e.g. 'doorbell'. This is used to display the live video feed in the card.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the doorbell server. Please check the URL and ensure the Hikvision Doorbell add-on is running.
